w0ypme.prompt: You are a senior AI infrastructure architect helping a startup optimize LLM cost and reliability in production. Your task is to analyze the following production scenario and provide a structured breakdown with recommendations. Scenario: We process 15,000 customer support tickets per day using GPT-4. Each ticket includes: Full conversation history (average 3,200 tokens), Internal system notes (800 tokens), Sentiment analysis metadata, Compliance checklist, Output formatting rules. We are experiencing unpredictable truncation issues and margin compression. Provide: 1. Root cause analysis 2. Cost estimate per ticket 3. Optimization strategy 4. Reliability mitigation plan 5. Monitoring framework.

h720h5.prompt: Summarize the following user conversation into a structured JSON object with intent, urgency level, compliance flags, product category, and recommended action. Conversation: [Insert 2–3 paragraphs here when testing]

86r9g5.prompt: You are operating in a regulated financial environment. All responses must comply with FINRA, SEC, and internal audit policy 4.3.2. Responses must include disclaimers, formatted citations, and structured bullet points. Task: Generate a client-facing explanation of margin lending risk during volatile market conditions.
